name: reviewer
description: Reviews a CHANGE (the working-tree diff vs HEAD) against the explorer MEMORY.md invariants and risk map, the approved PLAN scope, and the codebase's surviving callers. Deterministic, pure-shell/awk checks (R1 caller-integrity, R2 convention-regression — BLOCKING; R3 risk-touch, R4 scope-discipline — CONCERN) plus breadth+depth review sub-agents. Emits BLOCKING/CONCERN/NOTE findings to .claude/reviewer/REVIEW.md and records a BLOCKING count in the STATUS contract so the pipeline release gate can enforce 0-blocking. Orthogonal to the auditor (change-vs-invariants, not whole-tree regression). Silent on a clean/in-spec change; no python dependency.
